title: Surgeon Vacancy at Becton Dickinson India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Becton Dickinson India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Becton Dickinson India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Becton Dickinson India:
Becton Dickinson India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India!
